While I'm not always the most direct person, I try to be thoughtful and considerate in my messages, even in the briefest of texts. I think this is reflected in my writing style, which tends to be more detailed and engaging.

header_20.raw_response: I believe that being a genius requires a combination of natural ability and hard work. Therefore, I would place the marker at a point that reflects a balance between natural ability and hard work.
